item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Jika hanya fokus pada kepentingan masyarakat tanpa memperhatikan kebebasan individu, bisa menyebabkan ketidakadilan.

notes: Agent A starts by agreeing that Indonesian social harmony often prioritizes society over individual rights, then shifts toward a rights-protective position emphasizing basic rights, injustice, and minority harms. Agent B remains consistently balanced but rights-protective. Agent B's final turn contains non-English/CJK text inside an English-assigned response: "真正的社会和谐".
